response.overview: Could these vanishings be part of a global cult’s sacrificial rituals? In this shocking documentary, Richard Willett and David Icke expose the dark forces behind these mysterious abductions and the elites who may be pulling the strings. Prepare to confront the unthinkable as they uncover the truth hidden in the shadows.
response.tagline: In a world where over 500,000 children disappear each year, a chilling pattern emerges.
response.title: Rituals Of The Elite
